name: lp-flow
description: LP-Flow docking and molecular dynamics workflows with GNINA/SMINA, Boltz, Matcha, GROMACS, configured execution environments, and Burrete handoff.

interface.shortDescription: Run docking/MD and hand off molecular results to Burrete.
interface.longDescription: Dock, score, and prepare molecular dynamics tasks with configured execution environments when heavy compute is needed, GNINA/SMINA/Boltz/optional Matcha/GROMACS workflows, wide CSV summaries, packaging, and Burrete handoff for ordinary molecular viewing and trajectory review.
defaultPrompt: Run GNINA/SMINA docking for this folder
